title: The Spiral Escarpment

features.name: pressure-spiral
features.desc-on-touch: the spiral that began deep in the earth continues outward here; each ring marks a release, motion spiralling into freedom, but the spiral remembers where it came from

features.name: trapped-strata
features.desc-on-touch: layers of stone here hold the memory of being under pressure; they are reading themselves, learning what shape they took while trapped, and now they move by tremor

features.name: escape-route-mapped
features.desc-on-touch: a chart of how pressure learned to leave, line by line, showing which way the earth moves when it chooses to move

features.name: earth-s-own-language
features.desc-on-touch: the escarpment's edge speaks in the grammar of geological time; you can almost understand it if you stay still long enough for centuries to matter

inscription: pressure resolves by learning the shape of outward; the land is always becoming the direction it was forced to go

file.name: Tectonic_Release_Chronology_Deep_Time.log
file.note: how many years for pressure to learn motion; how many more for the land to accept its own spiral outward; the file is still being written by the earth

exits.label: back into the chamber where pressure is still resolving itself
out onto the open escarpment face, where the spiral continues into landscape you can see for miles
down into the valleys the spiral has carved, where water remembers falling under pressure
